# shared — llms.txt

> Shared Scripts des DkZ Dashboards. 74 Dateien — wiederverwendbare Komponenten fuer alle Module.
> Entry-Point: C:\DEVKiTZ\llms.txt
> Dashboard: C:\DEVKiTZ\01_PROJECTS\01_dashboard\llms.txt

## Kern-Dateien

| Datei | Zweck |
|:------|:------|
| dkz-theme.css | DkZ Design System v2 — CSS Custom Properties, Farben, Fonts, Layout |
| manifest.json | PWA Manifest fuer das Dashboard |
| sw.js | Service Worker fuer Offline-First Funktionalitaet |
| webhook-config.json | Webhook-Konfiguration |
| webhook-log.json | Webhook-Log Daten |

## Core Scripts (Pflicht — R21)

| Datei | Zweck |
|:------|:------|
| dkz-debug.js | XSS-Schutz mit esc(), Debug-Panel, DOM Inspector — PFLICHT (R21) |
| dkz-copilot.js | DkZ Copilot — KI-Assistent mit Chat, Kontext, Wissenszugriff (128 KB) |
| dkz-llm-registry.js | LLM Model Registry — alle Provider, Modelle, Routing, Kosten |
| dkz-eventlog.js | Event-Logging System fuer alle Module |
| dkz-navbar.js | Navigation Bar — Modul-Navigation, Suche, Favoriten |

## UI Components

| Datei | Zweck |
|:------|:------|
| dkz-headbar.js | Header Bar — Titel, Status, Quick Actions |
| dkz-toast.js | Toast Notifications — Erfolg, Warnung, Fehler |
| dkz-console.js | ESC-Console — 8 Tabs (Terminal, Gemini, Claude, GPT) (R42) |
| dkz-guide.js | Interaktiver Guide — Onboarding, Tooltips, Walkthroughs |
| dkz-chain-nav.js | Chain Navigation — Verkettete Modul-Navigation |
| dkz-shortcuts.js | Keyboard Shortcuts System |
| dkz-smart-ui.js | Smart UI — Adaptive Layouts und Responsive Verhalten |
| dkz-terminal.js | Inline Terminal Emulator |
